name: My App
description: User and team management data for My App, with schema-driven types and LLM directives

changeLog.change: Initial spec with User, Team, and Address entities
Added addEntity directive for scaffolding new entities

design.decision: Use UUIDs for all entity identities
design.rationale: Allows distributed ID generation and simplifies merges across environments

design.decision: Inline addresses rather than separate address collection
design.rationale: Addresses are always 1:1 with users; no need for a separate top-level collection

addEntity.description: Procedure for adding a new entity type to the spec schema and data

steps.description: Review the current schema types in meta.schema.types to understand existing entities and avoid naming conflicts.
Define the fields for the new entity in meta.schema.types, using primitives (string, number, boolean) or $ref to existing types.
Add a $ref entry in meta.schema.data to expose the new entity at the top level of data (e.g. "products": { "$ref": "Product[]" }).
Add an empty array in data for the new collection, then add at least one sample record.
Add a changelog entry documenting the new entity addition.

generateTypes.description: Generate TypeScript type definitions from the spec schema

steps.description: Read all types defined in meta.schema.types and generate corresponding TypeScript interfaces and type aliases.
Output file path for generated types

seedData.description: Generate seed data records for a given entity type

steps.description: Select the entity type to generate seed data for
Number of seed records to generate
Generate realistic sample records matching the entity schema. Ensure IDs are unique, required fields are populated, and $ref fields use valid IDs from existing data.
Append the generated records to the corresponding array in data and add a changelog entry.
